title: DinoBrik's Climate | Temperature System
description:
Extreme Climate Survival.
This data pack adds a temperature meter to the player's action bar. Depending on what biomes you are in, light levels, blocks you are standing on and other factors, the temperature will go up and down.
body:
This data pack adds a temperature meter to the player's action bar. Depending on what biomes you are in, light levels, blocks you are standing on and other factors, the temperature will go up and down. You get regeneration at the perfect temperature level.

### Guide:
🔥🔥☠🔥🔥 = Getting close to fetal heat (you will die soon, cool down now)  
🔥🔥🔥 = Getting close to fetal heat (darkness effect)  
🔥🔥 = Getting dangerously hot (nausea effect)  
🔥 = Getting cautiously hot (weakness effect)  
❂(red) = Further to the hot side of the temperature  
❂(white) = Near-perfect levels of temperature  
❂(blue) = Further to the cold side of the temperature  
❆ = Getting pretty chilly (slowness effect)  
❆❆ = Getting very cold (mining fatigue effect,)  
❆❆❆ = Getting dangerously cold (high-level slowness effect)  
❆❆☠❆❆ = Getting close to fetal freezing (you will die soon, warm up now)  

Have Fun!  
Help me out by following this datapack, and subscribing to my youtube:  
https://youtube.com/DinoBrikGaming?sub_confirmation=1

You can also join my discord server!
